title: Chiss Defense Force

The '''Chiss Defense Force''' was the internal defense [[fleet]] of the [[Chiss Ascendancy]]'s [[Ascendancy military|military]], charged with protecting the territory of the Ascendancy. It was led by [[Supreme Admiral]] [[Ja'fosk]], and consisted of multiple [[warship]]s including the [[Firewolf man-of-war]], the [[Groundlion man-of-war]],<ref name="Lesser Evil" /> and the [[Chiss Defense Force Transport]].<ref name="Chaos Rising" /> [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Fleet]] warships were not allowed to participate in events located within Chiss territory, as that was the Defense Force's responsibility.<ref name="Lesser Evil" />
